strengths: Nearly 20 years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform with real-world adoption
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) plus strong builder/code fluency
concerns: No demonstrated director-level or org-wide technical leadership; career trajectory is senior/staff IC on delivery teams
No recognized AI expertise, advanced AI degree, or shipped AI products at scale — AI exposure is recent and tooling-adjacent
No evidence of strategic advisory work with executives, customers, or partners, which is core to this role

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of engineering experience
Lack of AI strategy and recognized AI product leadership

response.justification: The candidate comfortably clears the 15-year experience bar and shows genuine builder fluency, startup/founder initiative, and early agentic-AI tooling work. However, this role is a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, and the ability to advise strategic customers and shape cloud/AI direction — none of which is evidenced. The profile reads as a strong senior/staff full-stack engineer rather than a principal-level AI strategist, making the fit weak despite solid fundamentals.
